_meta.description: Empty benchmark record template for the Oil Painting Research Assistant. Copy this structure when authoring new benchmark records. All field values are placeholders. All enum values must match controlled_vocabulary.json. Record must conform to schemas/benchmark_template.json.

question: The user-style question as a natural language prompt.
expected_answer_shape: Description of what a correct, well-formed answer should contain.
uncertainty_handling: How the answer should handle uncertainty for this question.
citation_expectation: What source types or tiers should be cited.
